requirement_topic.en: Restriction of Hazardous Substances (RoHS) — Substance Limits & Technical Documentation
requirement_topic.zh: 限制有害物质（RoHS）——物质限量及技术文件
requirement_topic.zht: 限制有害物質（RoHS）——物質限量及技術文件

summary.en: Directive 2011/65/EU restricts six hazardous substances (Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr⁶⁺, PBB, PBDE) plus four phthalates (added by Directive 2015/863/EU) in electrical and electronic equipment, including grid-tied PV inverters. Manufacturers must compile technical documentation demonstrating compliance using the harmonised standard EN IEC 63000:2018, and affix CE marking. Maximum concentration values (MCV) apply at the homogeneous material level.
summary.zh: 指令2011/65/EU限制电气电子设备（含并网光伏逆变器）中六种有害物质（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、多溴联苯、多溴二苯醚）及四种邻苯二甲酸酯（由指令2015/863/EU补充），制造商须按协调标准EN IEC 63000:2018编制技术文件以证明合规并加贴CE标志，限量适用于均质材料层面。
summary.zht: 指令2011/65/EU限制電氣電子設備（含並網光伏逆變器）中六種有害物質（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、多溴聯苯、多溴二苯醚）及四種鄰苯二甲酸酯（由指令2015/863/EU補充），製造商須按協調標準EN IEC 63000:2018編製技術文件以證明合規並加貼CE標誌，限量適用於均質材料層面。

standards_or_laws: EN IEC 63000:2018 (harmonised standard for technical documentation)

summary.en: GB/T 26572-2011 (recommended) sets the same six original restricted substances at the same MCVs. A new mandatory standard GB 26572-2025 (effective 2027-08-01) expands the list to ten substances by adding the same four phthalates, aligning with EU RoHS. Products must also carry a China RoHS hazardous substance marking (SJ/T 11364) indicating which substances are present and whether they exceed limits. Technical documentation requirements under China RoHS are less prescriptive than EN IEC 63000.
summary.zh: GB/T 26572-2011（推荐性标准）规定了相同的六种原始限制物质及相同限量值。新强制性标准GB 26572-2025（2027年8月1日起施行）增加四种邻苯二甲酸酯，物质总数扩至十种，与EU RoHS看齐。产品还须按SJ/T 11364加贴中国RoHS有害物质标识，注明各物质是否超限。中国RoHS技术文件要求不如EN IEC 63000严格。
summary.zht: GB/T 26572-2011（推薦性標準）規定了相同的六種原始限制物質及相同限量值。新強制性標準GB 26572-2025（2027年8月1日起施行）增加四種鄰苯二甲酸酯，物質總數擴至十種，與EU RoHS看齊。產品還須按SJ/T 11364加貼中國RoHS有害物質標識，注明各物質是否超限。中國RoHS技術文件要求不如EN IEC 63000嚴格。

gap.en: EU requires a formal technical documentation file compliant with EN IEC 63000:2018, covering material declarations, supply-chain evidence, and a declaration of conformity. Chinese factories exporting to the EU commonly produce a generic DoC without the structured evidence package required by EN IEC 63000. Additionally, GB/T 26572-2011 (current) is only a recommended standard and does not mandate CE-style documentation; GB 26572-2025 introduces mandatory substance limits but its documentation regime remains less rigorous. Four phthalates are not yet legally restricted under the current CN mandatory framework until 2027.
gap.zh: 欧盟要求按EN IEC 63000:2018编制正式技术文件，包含材料声明、供应链证明及符合性声明。中国工厂普遍只提供通用符合性声明，缺乏EN IEC 63000所要求的结构化证据包。现行GB/T 26572-2011为推荐性标准，不强制CE式技术文件；GB 26572-2025虽引入强制限量，但文件要求仍不及EU严格。四种邻苯二甲酸酯在2027年前尚未纳入中国强制限制范围。
gap.zht: 歐盟要求按EN IEC 63000:2018編製正式技術文件，包含材料聲明、供應鏈證明及符合性聲明。中國工廠普遍只提供通用符合性聲明，缺乏EN IEC 63000所要求的結構化證據包。現行GB/T 26572-2011為推薦性標準，不強制CE式技術文件；GB 26572-2025雖引入強制限量，但文件要求仍不及EU嚴格。四種鄰苯二甲酸酯在2027年前尚未納入中國強制限制範圍。

mandatory_status.eu: Mandatory — CE marking prerequisite for all EEE placed on EU market

compliance_verdict.en: Attention required. A Chinese PV inverter factory exporting to the EU must produce an EN IEC 63000-compliant technical documentation package (not just a generic DoC) and ensure all ten restricted substances are within MCVs at homogeneous material level. This is a common documentation gap for CN exporters.
compliance_verdict.zh: 需重点关注。中国光伏逆变器工厂出口欧盟，须编制符合EN IEC 63000的完整技术文件包（而非仅通用符合性声明），并确保均质材料层面十种受限物质均符合限量要求。这是中国出口商普遍存在的文件短板。
compliance_verdict.zht: 需重點關注。中國光伏逆變器工廠出口歐盟，須編製符合EN IEC 63000的完整技術文件包（而非僅通用符合性聲明），並確保均質材料層面十種受限物質均符合限量要求。這是中國出口商普遍存在的文件短板。

requirement_topic.en: Waste Electrical and Electronic Equipment (WEEE) — Producer Registration & Authorised Representative
requirement_topic.zh: 废弃电气电子设备（WEEE）——生产者登记与授权代表
requirement_topic.zht: 廢棄電氣電子設備（WEEE）——生產者登記與授權代表

summary.en: Directive 2012/19/EU requires producers (including importers) of EEE — which encompasses PV inverters (Category 4: Large Equipment) — to register in each EU Member State where they sell, or appoint a local authorised representative to fulfil producer responsibilities on their behalf. Obligations include financing end-of-life collection and recycling, marking products with the crossed-out wheeled bin symbol (Annex IX), and periodic reporting to national registers. Registration is per-country; there is no single EU-wide registration.
summary.zh: 指令2012/19/EU要求电气电子设备（含光伏逆变器，属第4类大型设备）的生产者（含进口商）在每个销售所在的欧盟成员国进行登记，或指定当地授权代表代为履行生产者义务。义务包括资助报废回收、在产品上加贴划叉垃圾桶标志（附件IX），并定期向国家登记簿报告。登记须按国家分别进行，无单一欧盟统一登记。
summary.zht: 指令2012/19/EU要求電氣電子設備（含光伏逆變器，屬第4類大型設備）的生產者（含進口商）在每個銷售所在的歐盟成員國進行登記，或指定當地授權代表代為履行生產者義務。義務包括資助報廢回收、在產品上加貼劃叉垃圾桶標誌（附件IX），並定期向國家登記簿報告。登記須按國家分別進行，無單一歐盟統一登記。

standards_or_laws: Annex IX — Marking requirements (crossed-out bin symbol)

summary.en: China does not have a direct national equivalent to WEEE producer registration at the point of export. Domestically, the 'Management Methods for the Administration of the Recovery and Disposal of Waste Electrical and Electronic Products' (废弃电器电子产品回收处理管理条例, State Council Order No. 551) imposes end-of-life obligations on domestic sellers, but Chinese manufacturers exporting inverters to the EU are typically not subject to this domestically for exported goods. No CN-side registration mirrors the per-MS WEEE registration obligation.
summary.zh: 中国出口端没有直接对应的WEEE生产者登记制度。国内依据《废弃电器电子产品回收处理管理条例》（国务院令第551号）对国内销售商征收报废处理义务，但出口逆变器的中国制造商通常不在出口商品的国内义务范围内。中国端无对应欧盟各成员国WEEE登记的制度。
summary.zht: 中國出口端沒有直接對應的WEEE生產者登記制度。國內依據《廢棄電器電子產品回收處理管理條例》（國務院令第551號）對國內銷售商徵收報廢處理義務，但出口逆變器的中國製造商通常不在出口商品的國內義務範圍內。中國端無對應歐盟各成員國WEEE登記的制度。

standards_or_laws: 废弃电器电子产品回收处理管理条例 (State Council Order No. 551, 2009) — domestic scope only

gap.en: WEEE national registration is one of the most commonly overlooked obligations by Chinese PV inverter exporters. Selling in, say, Germany, the Netherlands, and Poland requires three separate national registrations (or three separate authorised representative appointments). This is an administrative and cost burden with no CN-side parallel. Failure to register can result in market access denial, product seizure, or fines under national transpositions. The crossed-out bin marking must also appear physically on the product.
gap.zh: WEEE国家登记是中国光伏逆变器出口商最常遗漏的合规义务之一。例如，在德国、荷兰及波兰销售，须分别在三个国家进行登记或委任三位授权代表，无对应的中国侧程序。未登记可能导致市场准入被拒、产品被扣押或遭受各成员国转化法律的罚款。划叉垃圾桶标志须实体标注在产品上。
gap.zht: WEEE國家登記是中國光伏逆變器出口商最常遺漏的合規義務之一。例如，在德國、荷蘭及波蘭銷售，須分別在三個國家進行登記或委任三位授權代表，無對應的中國側程序。未登記可能導致市場準入被拒、產品被扣押或遭受各成員國轉化法律的罰款。劃叉垃圾桶標誌須實體標注在產品上。

mandatory_status.eu: Mandatory — required before placing product on market in each Member State
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent export-side obligation (domestic end-of-life rules apply to domestic sellers only)

compliance_verdict.en: Attention required. Per-member-state WEEE registration (or appointment of an authorised representative) is a concrete administrative prerequisite with no Chinese analogue. Chinese PV inverter exporters frequently lack this registration, creating market-access risk.
compliance_verdict.zh: 需重点关注。WEEE按成员国登记（或委任授权代表）是具体的行政前提条件，在中国侧无对应流程。中国光伏逆变器出口商普遍缺少此登记，存在市场准入风险。
compliance_verdict.zht: 需重點關注。WEEE按成員國登記（或委任授權代表）是具體的行政前提條件，在中國側無對應流程。中國光伏逆變器出口商普遍缺少此登記，存在市場準入風險。

requirement_topic.en: REACH — Substances of Very High Concern (SVHC) Disclosure
requirement_topic.zh: REACH法规——高关注度物质（SVHC）信息披露
requirement_topic.zht: REACH法規——高關注度物質（SVHC）資訊披露

summary.en: Regulation (EC) No 1907/2006 (REACH), Article 33, requires any supplier of an article — including a PV inverter — to notify business customers and, upon request, consumers if the article contains any Substance of Very High Concern (SVHC) from the ECHA Candidate List at a concentration above 0.1% w/w. As of early 2026 the Candidate List contains over 240 SVHCs. Notification must be made within 45 days of a customer request. REACH also imposes downstream obligations for authorisation and restriction of specific substances (Titles VII and VIII).
summary.zh: 法规(EC) No 1907/2006（REACH）第33条要求物品（含光伏逆变器）的任何供应商，若物品中ECHA候选物质清单所列高关注度物质（SVHC）浓度超过0.1%（质量分数），须主动通知企业客户，并于消费者要求时提供相关信息。截至2026年初，候选清单已包含逾240种SVHC。须于客户提出要求后45天内回复。REACH第VII、VIII章还就特定物质规定了授权及限制义务。
summary.zht: 法規(EC) No 1907/2006（REACH）第33條要求物品（含光伏逆變器）的任何供應商，若物品中ECHA候選物質清單所列高關注度物質（SVHC）濃度超過0.1%（質量分數），須主動通知企業客戶，並於消費者要求時提供相關資訊。截至2026年初，候選清單已包含逾240種SVHC。須於客戶提出要求後45天內回覆。REACH第VII、VIII章還就特定物質規定了授權及限制義務。

standards_or_laws: ECHA SVHC Candidate List (updated periodically; last updated 2026-02-04 per ECHA)

summary.en: China does not have a direct equivalent to REACH SVHC disclosure obligations for exporters. Domestically, the 'Measures for Environmental Management of New Chemical Substances' (新化学物质环境管理办法, MEE Order No. 12, 2020) regulates new chemical substances but does not impose article-level SVHC disclosure on finished product manufacturers. Chinese PV inverter factories typically address REACH only when required by EU customers through contractual supply-chain questionnaires (e.g., IPC-1752A).
summary.zh: 中国没有针对出口商的直接对应REACH SVHC信息披露制度。国内《新化学物质环境管理办法》（生态环境部令第12号，2020年）规范新化学物质登记，但不要求成品制造商进行物品级SVHC披露。中国光伏逆变器工厂通常仅在欧盟客户以合同形式提出供应链问卷（如IPC-1752A）时才处理REACH合规事宜。
summary.zht: 中國沒有針對出口商的直接對應REACH SVHC資訊披露制度。國內《新化學物質環境管理辦法》（生態環境部令第12號，2020年）規範新化學物質登記，但不要求成品製造商進行物品級SVHC披露。中國光伏逆變器工廠通常僅在歐盟客戶以合同形式提出供應鏈問卷（如IPC-1752A）時才處理REACH合規事宜。

standards_or_laws: 新化学物质环境管理办法 (MEE Order No. 12, 2020) — new chemical substances registration, domestic scope

gap.en: EU REACH imposes a proactive, ongoing obligation: as ECHA adds new SVHCs to the Candidate List (updates occur roughly twice yearly), suppliers must re-assess their articles and notify customers if the threshold is exceeded. Chinese factories typically lack the material disclosure management systems (e.g., continuous BOM-level SVHC screening) to fulfil this ongoing obligation. Gaps in supply-chain data from sub-tier component suppliers are common. No Chinese law imposes a comparable proactive article-level disclosure duty on exporters.
gap.zh: EU REACH规定了持续性主动义务：ECHA每年约两次更新候选清单，供应商须持续重新评估物品并在超标时主动通知客户。中国工厂通常缺乏持续BOM级SVHC筛查等材料披露管理体系来履行此持续义务，下层零部件供应商的供应链数据缺口普遍存在。中国法律对出口商无类似的主动物品级披露义务。
gap.zht: EU REACH規定了持續性主動義務：ECHA每年約兩次更新候選清單，供應商須持續重新評估物品並在超標時主動通知客戶。中國工廠通常缺乏持續BOM級SVHC篩查等材料披露管理體系來履行此持續義務，下層零部件供應商的供應鏈數據缺口普遍存在。中國法律對出口商無類似的主動物品級披露義務。

mandatory_status.eu: Mandatory — Article 33 notification obligation applies to all EU market participants in the supply chain

compliance_verdict.en: Attention required. EU REACH SVHC disclosure is an ongoing, proactively managed obligation that the current Chinese regulatory environment does not mirror. PV inverter exporters to the EU should maintain a live SVHC screening process against every updated Candidate List.
compliance_verdict.zh: 需重点关注。EU REACH SVHC披露是须主动持续管理的义务，中国现行监管环境没有对应制度。出口欧盟的光伏逆变器厂商应针对每次候选清单更新维持动态SVHC筛查流程。
compliance_verdict.zht: 需重點關注。EU REACH SVHC披露是須主動持續管理的義務，中國現行監管環境沒有對應制度。出口歐盟的光伏逆變器廠商應針對每次候選清單更新維持動態SVHC篩查流程。

requirement_topic.en: EU Battery Regulation (2023/1542) — Out of Scope for Grid-Tied PV Inverters (No Integrated Battery)
requirement_topic.zh: 欧盟电池法规（2023/1542）——不适用于无集成电池的并网光伏逆变器（超出本工具范围）
requirement_topic.zht: 歐盟電池法規（2023/1542）——不適用於無集成電池的並網光伏逆變器（超出本工具範圍）

summary.en: Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 on batteries and waste batteries imposes substance restrictions, carbon footprint declarations, battery passports, and end-of-life obligations on batteries placed on the EU market — including stationary battery energy storage systems (SBESS). This regulation is NOT applicable to standalone grid-tied PV inverters that contain no integrated battery. It is noted here for completeness: if an inverter product integrates a battery (e.g., hybrid inverter with built-in storage), the Battery Regulation may apply to the battery component and should be assessed separately.
summary.zh: 法规(EU) 2023/1542就投放欧盟市场的电池（含固定式储能系统）规定了物质限制、碳足迹声明、电池护照及报废义务。该法规不适用于不含集成电池的独立并网光伏逆变器。此处列出以供完整参考：若逆变器产品集成电池（如含内置储能的混合逆变器），则电池部件可能受电池法规约束，须另行评估。
summary.zht: 法規(EU) 2023/1542就投放歐盟市場的電池（含固定式儲能系統）規定了物質限制、碳足跡聲明、電池護照及報廢義務。該法規不適用於不含集成電池的獨立並網光伏逆變器。此處列出以供完整參考：若逆變器產品集成電池（如含內置儲能的混合逆變器），則電池部件可能受電池法規約束，須另行評估。

summary.en: Not applicable for this scope. China's battery management rules (e.g., GB 38031 for EV batteries, MEE battery recycling regulations) are similarly out of scope for a standalone grid-tied PV inverter without integrated storage.
summary.zh: 不适用于本范围。中国电池管理规定（如新能源汽车动力蓄电池GB 38031等）同样不适用于无集成储能的独立并网光伏逆变器。
summary.zht: 不適用於本範圍。中國電池管理規定（如新能源汽車動力蓄電池GB 38031等）同樣不適用於無集成儲能的獨立並網光伏逆變器。

gap.en: No gap applicable — this row is a scope-exclusion notice, not a compliance row. Battery/storage substance requirements are explicitly excluded from this inverter-only compliance comparison. Manufacturers of hybrid inverters with integrated storage must conduct a separate assessment against EU Battery Regulation 2023/1542.
gap.zh: 不适用——本行为范围排除说明，非合规对比行。电池/储能物质要求明确不在本逆变器专项合规比较范围内。集成储能的混合逆变器制造商须另行依据EU电池法规2023/1542进行独立评估。
gap.zht: 不適用——本行為範圍排除說明，非合規對比行。電池/儲能物質要求明確不在本逆變器專項合規比較範圍內。集成儲能的混合逆變器製造商須另行依據EU電池法規2023/1542進行獨立評估。

mandatory_status.eu: Out of scope — applies to batteries / battery-integrated products only
mandatory_status.cn: Out of scope — no equivalent obligation for standalone inverters

compliance_verdict.en: Out of scope for this tool's grid-tied PV inverter (no integrated battery) MVP. Noted for transparency. Hybrid inverters with built-in storage fall outside this comparison and require a separate Battery Regulation assessment.
compliance_verdict.zh: 不在本工具并网光伏逆变器（无集成电池）MVP范围内，仅作透明度说明。含内置储能的混合逆变器超出本比较范围，须另行进行电池法规评估。
compliance_verdict.zht: 不在本工具並網光伏逆變器（無集成電池）MVP範圍內，僅作透明度說明。含內置儲能的混合逆變器超出本比較範圍，須另行進行電池法規評估。
